title: Dry Brushing Skin: Benefits, Technique & What to Expect
meta_description: Discover the real benefits of dry brushing skin, how to do it correctly, what brush to use, and how to pair it with clean body care for best results.
image_prompt: Lifestyle photography, bright spa-like bathroom setting where a person dry brushes their lower leg while seated on the edge of a freestanding white soaking tub, wearing a white cotton robe with the hem pulled to the knee exposing only the lower leg and bare foot, holding a natural-bristle long-handled wooden dry body brush mid-stroke against their shin, a second smaller round dry brush resting on a neatly folded white Turkish towel on the tub ledge beside them, a white ceramic dish holding an unwrapped plain white round soap puck and a small open glass jar of organic virgin coconut oil with a bamboo spatula resting across the rim placed naturally on the towel as secondary elements, white hexagonal floor tiles visible below, soft blurred white subway tile wall in the background, warm diffused morning light streaming in from a frosted window to the left casting a gentle glow across the tub edge and towel, photorealistic, 35mm lens, shot on Canon R5, wide landscape crop filling the full frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no borders.
